we-are-kodschul.heading: We are Kodschul
we-are-kodschul.title: A Team of success for your success
we-are-kodschul.subtitle: Our team of trainers comes with extensive project experience. We have been working in the tech space for many years and possess the knowledge needed to deliver top-notch seminars. We don't just discuss topics; we bring real-world project experience and hard-earned expertise. Combined, we've completed over 300 IT projects in the past decades.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: We take your privacy seriously. This page outlines how your personal data is collected, processed, and protected when you use our services.

questions.q: Who is this course designed for?
questions.a: Our courses are designed for all types of individuals. Just get in touch with us, and we will provide you with a tailored solution.

questions.q: How can I enroll in the course?
questions.a: To enroll, simply call us or send us an email. We'll guide you through the registration process and answer any questions you may have.

questions.q: What is the cost of the course?
questions.a: Course fees are listed on our website, but we believe prices shouldn't prevent anyone from learning. Our mission is to teach as many developers as possible, so please give us a call to discuss pricing options.

questions.q: Do I need prior knowledge of the course topic?
questions.a: No prior knowledge of the specific topic is required. The course is designed to accommodate beginners as well as those with some experience. It will cover the fundamentals and provide practical insights.

questions.q: Will I be able to apply what I learn in this course?
questions.a: Yes, by the end of the course, you will have the skills and knowledge needed to apply what you've learned effectively. The course includes hands-on exercises and practical examples to ensure you can put your learning into practice.

questions.q: What software or tools do I need for the course?
questions.a: The course may require specific software or tools. Detailed requirements will be provided at the start of the course, along with instructions for installation and setup.
